content:
Maintenance from December 12th 08:00-11:00 (UTC+8)
Maintenance Compensation: Silver Core×200, Pure Core×5

**【Update Content】**

2. **New Activity**
【**Thais Rerun**】
● The event will be available from December 16th 9:00 - January 13th 9:00, also with banners, gift boxs on sale and her own event with limited event sr wheel.
● During event, “Procreation Frenzy” will be unlocked after finishing main story 2-9(Normal).
● The “Reality Starting Point” costs to unlock “Procreation Frenzy” stories only need one now and won’t require Affinity levels.
● The Affinity you get in any ways will be doubled during event.

2. **General Updates**
● Updated some system effect diagrams in the "Tutorial" to make text and image descriptions more accurate.
● Optimized the layout of the "Investigation Data" interface, now defaulting to preview the "Creator" information at the bottom, facilitating Keepers' team composition overview.
● Optimized movement speed in "Exploration", appropriately accelerating the pace.
● Simplified exploration process by removing event option pop-ups when reaching "Secret Passage Exit".
● Skipping story will no longer skip in-battle narrative.

3. **Problem Fixes**
● Fixed potential empty popup when clicking "New Followers" button in "Alumni" too quickly.
● Fixed Tawil's skill "Master of All Things" card changes unable to enjoy "Giant's Blade" Arithmetica cost reduction.
● Fixed "Blade of Defiance" under Tawil's "Master of All Things" not reducing Arithmetica cost when using "Strike".
● Fixed "Keen Blade" under Tawil's "Master of All Things" not reducing Arithmetica cost when using "Defense".
● Corrected description discrepancy for "Suffering's End" discovered through Tawil's "All Things Return" Madness Burst.
● Fixed "Sacred Instinct" failing to correctly read Tawil's Enlightened level.
● Resolved Erica's "Mechanical Armament - Release" skill losing "Echoing Melody" status when changing to "Mechanical Armament - Converge".
● Fixed Liz's "Corrupted/Deadly Green Flame" potentially reverting to "Green Flame" when entering next battle in Ultra Space.
● Corrected Helot - Catena's "Bloody Chain" skill interaction with "In the Twilight" Relic and "Giant's Blade" wheel Arithmetica cost reduction.
● Fixed Miryam's "Testament of Faith" Rouse card unable to enjoy Awakener shield enhancement effects.
● Resolved potential issue of Relic cards entering player's hand after Ramona's awakening in D-Tide Zone's fifth stage.
● Fixed "Chrono Pedulum - Wish" occasionally displaying two "Refresh" instances.
● Corrected potential duplicate Relic generation during "Refresh" in Chrono Pedulum - Wish.
● Fixed potential failure of gaining 30 Aliemus when choosing "Force Through" in Chapter 8's "Guards" event.
● Corrected Primodial Core description regarding monthly exchange limit (should be 5 times per month).
● Fixed skill description inconsistencies for Ogier, Lotan, and Nymphea when having damage count increase buffs.
● Resolved Career Achievements wheel stacking count reduction due to wheel dismantle.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​
